## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing API)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test / CI

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands you ran, edge cases you covered. -->

```bash
pytest -m "not integration"
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added/updated; full suite passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` / `ruff format` clean
- [ ] `mypy drg` clean
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `README.md` / `docs/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under `[Unreleased]`) for user-visible changes
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or unrelated changes staged
